title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
summary: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

title: Solv Protocol Will Dump LayerZero, Migrate $700M Tokenized Bitcoin Tech to Chainlink
summary: Solv Protocol will move its tokenized Bitcoin infrastructure to Chainlink, following Kelp DAO's lead after it blamed LayerZero for a hack.

title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
summary: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
summary: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope
summary: Elon Musk's legal effort to dismantle OpenAI may hinge on how its for-profit subsidiary enhances or detracts from the frontier lab's founding mission of ensuring that humanity benefits from artificial general intelligence.

title: 21Shares Debuts First ETF Focused on Canton Network Crypto Token
summary: The Nasdaq-listed fund offers exposure to Canton Coin, native token of the privacy-focused institutional blockchain network.

title: Kalshi doubles valuation in 5 months, hitting $22B
summary: Prediction market startup Kalshi has raised a $1 billion Series F round led by Coatue.

title: Kalshi valuation doubles to $22B after $1B funding round
summary: Backing from Wall Street and Silicon Valley firms signals growing investor interest in regulated event trading despite mounting legal scrutiny.

title: How Anthropic’s Mythos has rewritten Firefox’s approach to cybersecurity
summary: Security researchers at Mozilla say Anthropic's Mythos has unearthed a wealth of high-severity bugs in Firefox.

title: Prediction Market Kalshi Boosts Valuation to $22 Billion With Fresh $1 Billion Investment
summary: Kalshi has another billion dollars to play with as the U.S. prediction market leader continues to grow at a rapid pace.

title: Google Found a Way to Make Local AI Up to 3x Faster—No New Hardware Required
summary: Google's new Multi-Token Prediction drafters can make Gemma 4 run up to 3x faster on your own hardware—no cloud required, and no quality lost.

title: OpenAI前董事：馬斯克主動捐精 兩人已有四個孩子
summary: OpenAI前董事齊利斯出庭作證，透露她與伊隆·馬斯克已育有4名子女。2020年馬斯克主動提議捐贈精子，她因健康因素接受。兩人約十年前曾有過一次「短暫」的戀情，但生子時並非戀愛關係。
